strengths.evidence: Implementation of Supabase in supabase-anonymous-board and Next.js in miniroom-demo showcases expertise in cloud-based integrations.
GitHub Actions workflow in github-star-checker demonstrates automation capabilities.
Usage of TypeScript in dev-insights-dashboard and miniroom-demo highlights proficiency in web development.
Python scripts in chrome-cookie-reader and claude-tutorial-playground exhibit scripting skills.

en.ai_summary: The developer demonstrates a strong foundation in automation, web development, and scripting, with a growing interest in AI-powered tools.

strengths.evidence: supabase-anonymous-board를 사회드립틀 신린 있다. miniroom-demo를 사회드립틀 Next.js를 사회드립틀 총큰 정보를 없는다.
